message:
fix: prevent accidental modal close and add missing Escape handlers (#4107)

- CardConfigModal: migrate from raw div to BaseModal with closeOnBackdrop=false,
  gaining Escape key, focus trap, aria-modal, and portal rendering
- GitHubInvite: add stopPropagation on modal content to prevent backdrop clicks
  from dismissing the form
- KyvernoDetailModal: disable backdrop close (has search form)
- Storage PVCListModal: disable backdrop close (has search form)
- Deploy group picker: replace manual Escape handler with useModalNavigation
  and useModalFocusTrap hooks; add backdrop blur
- StackSelector dropdown: add Escape key handler to close dropdown
- RSSFeed: add Escape key handler for overlay panels (settings, filter editor,
  feed selector, source filter, aggregate creator)

Closes #3953

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
